mapper.sql: id, user_id, trade_time, opt, price, code, vol, commission, tax, day, month, year, broker_id, created_time, updated_time, trans_fee, term, row_key
mapper.insert: insert into trade_detail (id, user_id, trade_time, opt, price, code, vol, commission, tax, day, month, year, broker_id, created_time, updated_time, trans_fee, term, row_key) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tradeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{opt,jdbcType=BIT}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{vol,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{commission,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{tax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{day,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{month,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{year,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{brokerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{term,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rowKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update:
update trade_detail
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
trade_time = #{tradeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
opt = #{opt,jdbcType=BIT},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
vol = #{vol,jdbcType=INTEGER},
commission = #{commission,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
tax = #{tax,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
day = #{day,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
month = #{month,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
year = #{year,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
broker_id = #{brokerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
trans_fee = #{transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
term = #{term,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
row_key = #{rowKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update trade_detail set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, trade_time = #{tradeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, opt = #{opt,jdbcType=BIT}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, vol = #{vol,jdbcType=INTEGER}, commission = #{commission,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, tax = #{tax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, day = #{day,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, month = #{month,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, year = #{year,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, broker_id = #{brokerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, trans_fee = #{transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, term = #{term,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, row_key = #{rowKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into trade_detail (id, user_id, trade_time, opt, price, code, vol, commission, tax, day, month, year, broker_id, created_time, updated_time, trans_fee, term, row_key) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.tradeTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.opt,jdbcType=BIT}, #{item.price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.vol,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.commission,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.tax,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.day,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.month,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.year,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.brokerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.transFee,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.term,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.rowKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
